ogTitle: Aldinga Beach vs Allenby Gardens: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Aldinga Beach and Allenby Gardens.
heading: Aldinga Beach vs Allenby Gardens — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Aldinga Beach, South Australia and Allenby Gardens, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Aldinga Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Allenby Gardens (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Aldinga Beach or Allenby Gardens safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Aldinga Beach has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Allenby Gardens scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Aldinga Beach scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Allenby Gardens scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Aldinga Beach or Allenby Gardens?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Aldinga Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
